samples.xml_description:
<module id="edge_detect">
    <description>Detects rising and falling edges in the input signal a and generates corresponding output signals rise and down.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="a">Input signal.</input>
        <output id="rise">Output signal indicating a rising edge.</output>
        <output id="down">Output signal indicating a falling edge.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>The edge_detect module detects rising and falling edges in the input signal a and generates corresponding output signals rise and down. The rising and falling edges are detected on the positive edge of the clock signal clk. If a rising edge is detected, the rise output signal is set to 1. If a falling edge is detected, the down output signal is set to 1. Otherwise, both output signals are set to 0. These output signals are synchronized with the clock and remain set to 1 until the corresponding edge appears again.</implementation>
</module>
